headline: CAPITAL ONE 2019 DATA BREACH CLASS ACTION
summary: This certified class action has now settled subject to court approval. Capital One will pay $35,000,000 (thirty-five million dollars) to settle the claims of all class members in Canada except residents of Quebec. The BC Supreme Court will hold a settlement approval hearing at the Court House at 800 Smithe Street, Vancouver, British Columbia on September 22, 2026.

headline: Card Loans, Fee Income to Support COF Q2 Earnings, Provisions to Hurt
summary: Capital One's Q2 earnings are likely to have gained from card loans, NII and fee income, while higher provisions and expenses are expected to have put pressure.

headline: Is Capital One Financial (COF) Trading At A Discount Or A Premium?
summary: Capital One Financial’s valuation is pulling in two directions, with an Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while traditional earnings multiples paint a less generous picture, even after a strong multi year share price run. Over the past 3 years, Capital One Financial has returned 85.8%, which puts more pressure on today’s entry price to be supported by fundamentals rather than momentum. Analyst enthusiasm around the Discover acquisition and card integration...

headline: Capital One Financial (COF) Is Up 8.8% After Cluster Of Upbeat Wall Street Analyst Calls
summary: In recent days, several major Wall Street firms, including UBS, BTIG, HSBC and Piper Sandler, have issued upbeat analyst calls on Capital One Financial, adding fresh positive coverage to the stock. This cluster of supportive opinions from high-profile analysts appears to have shifted investor attention toward Capital One’s perceived quality and relative value. Next, we’ll examine how this wave of optimistic analyst coverage interacts with Capital One’s existing investment narrative and risk...

headline: Capital One (COF) Unveils Up To $500 In Spark Business Travel Credits
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has introduced new travel credits for Spark Cash Plus and Spark Cash business cardholders. The credits are designed to be used on Capital One Business Travel bookings, adding a new benefit for business customers. This move links card rewards more directly to Capital One's business travel platform and could influence how companies manage travel spend. Capital One Financial, trading at around $208.89 per share, is adding this travel credit feature at a time...
